text:
Beeta (ベータ, Bēta) Jump Ryu! Vol. 21 - Togashi's notes is a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Tubeppa. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 

Appearance

Beeta has dark eyes, high eyebrows, and dark hair. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Beeta stays stationed by his employer Prince Tubeppa, as she works on her laptop. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Beeta's name was revealed in one of the characters sheets shown during Togashi's interview for Jump Ryu! Vol. 21.
